mainEntity.name: Timeline for workers' comp settlement in Idaho after back surgery?
mainEntity.text: Timeline for workers' comp settlement in Idaho after back surgery?

acceptedAnswer.text: 6-18 months post-MMI; faster with lawyer negotiation vs. hearing.

suggestedAnswer.text: Medicals first, then PPI rating. Lump sum approval by Commission. Insurers lowball; structured settlements for ongoing care in Nampa.

name: Idaho Work Injury Settlement Timeline
description: 6-18 months post-MMI; faster with lawyer negotiation vs. hearing.
